pickaxe_keep_game.description: Pickaxe Keep (Terraria-style 2.5D sidescroll mining + crafting + survival sandbox). Host generates the opening world (rolling surface, dirt + stone + ore pockets, scattered trees) and broadcasts it; per-peer mining and placement broadcast as deltas. Day/night cycle drives zombie spawning at night and burn-on-sun by day. Inventory, crafting, hotbar, and damage are tracked per-peer.
